title: ferray-stats: no multi-axis reductions — axis only accepts single usize
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy allows np.sum(arr, axis=(0, 2)) to reduce over multiple axes at once. ferray-stats reductions take axis: Option<usize> — either reduce all (None) or reduce one axis. Reducing over multiple axes requires chaining calls, which creates intermediate arrays and can produce wrong axis indices if not careful. Add axis: Option<&[usize]> or a separate multi-axis variant.
